errors.dataProvidedDoesntMeetRequirements: Unknown error: provided data does not meet operation requirements.
errors.prevBatchIsNotDone: Previous transaction is not finished yet.
errors.twoFactorCodeIsRequired: Two-factor authentication is enabled, the code is required
errors.regularEntryTitleExists: A regular operation with this title already exists. Choose another one
errors.unexpectedRequestError: Unexpected request error. Please try again later
errors.paramNotInteger: One of the parameters is not an integer
errors.attachBothPlannedTypes: Cannot attach a planned monthly operation and a planned regular-budget operation at the same time
errors.monthEntryNotFoundOrNotOwned: Monthly operation record with this ID does not exist or does not belong to the user
errors.monthEntryDateMismatch: Operation date does not match the month of the linked planned monthly operation
errors.monthEntryCategoryMismatch: Operation category must match the category of the linked planned monthly operation
errors.regEntryNotFoundOrNotOwned: Regular operation record with this ID does not exist or does not belong to the user
errors.regEntryDateMismatch: Operation date does not match the month of the linked planned regular-budget operation
errors.regEntryCategoryMismatch: Operation category must match the category of the linked planned regular-budget operation
errors.foreignOrMissingMonthEntries: Some monthly operation records are already linked to another budget plan or do not exist with the specified ID
errors.plannedRegularEntriesNotOwned: Some planned regular operation IDs do not exist or do not belong to the user
errors.budgetPlanNotFoundForMonth: Budget plan not found for month {month} and year {year}

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.codeStepTitle: Enter the code from the authenticator app

signup.title: Create your account
signup.workModeTooltip: Online: cloud sync. Offline: data stays only in your browser.
signup.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

recovery.title: Password recovery
recovery.description: Enter the email associated with your account and we will send a password reset link.
recovery.rightSideDescription: Secure password recovery via an encrypted link. Your data is protected at every step.
recovery.emailDescription: We will send instructions to your inbox

confirmCode.title: Confirm code
confirmCode.rightSideDescription: We use two-factor verification so your financial data stays safely locked.
confirmCode.codeDescription: The code is valid for 5 minutes

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Please enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.rightSideDescription: Use a combination of symbols, letters and digits for maximum protection.
